---
Title: "Clinical Survival Analysis of Lung Cancer Patients"
author: "Linda Zoungrana"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

# Introduction

This project analyzes survival outcomes in lung cancer patients using clinical data.  
The goal is to identify factors associated with mortality risk.

# Dataset

The dataset contains clinical variables including:

- survival time
- patient age
- sex
- ECOG performance score

# Load Libraries

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(survival)
library(survminer)







Introduction
Dataset Description
Methods
Results
Discussion
Conclusion
